creator: pmh@hausen.com
text:
Working perfectly this time:
---------
smsc0 on uhub1
smsc0: <vendor 0x0424 product 0xec00, rev 2.00/2.00, addr 3> on usbus1
smsc0: Ethernet address found in bootargs b8:27:eb:2a:c:1c.
smsc0: chip 0xec00, rev. 0002
miibus0: <MII bus> on smsc0
smscphy0: <SMC LAN8700 10/100 interface> PHY 1 on miibus0
smscphy0:  10baseT, 10baseT-FDX, 100baseTX, 100baseTX-FDX, auto
---------
root@pi8:~ # ifconfig ue0
ue0: flags=8843<UP,BROADCAST,RUNNING,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1500
	options=80009<RXCSUM,VLAN_MTU,LINKSTATE>
	ether b8:27:eb:2a:0c:1c
---------
